svg.title: AXON Language Architecture — AI-native programming language overview
svg.desc: A layered architectural diagram showing the AXON language stack from syntax down to runtime, covering agent primitives, memory, RAG, orchestration, and tooling.
svg.text: Built for agents, RAG, orchestration and LLM-first systems

g.text: Gradual typing · ADTs · Traits/interfaces · Pattern matching · String interpolation
Not libraries. Baked into the language itself.
Async-first · Actor model for agents · Channels · Fiber scheduler
Safety & observability — built in, not bolted on
WASM · C FFI · Python bindings · JVM · Provider-agnostic model layer
Single toolchain: axon build · run · test · fmt · eval · trace · deploy
Built-in package manager · Fast incremental compilation · LSP server
